vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_040: (Laughs) As I was saying, go ahead and open 'Area Overview'. You'll see that I took the liberty of setting an area aside for the pool. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_040_alt: (Laughs) As I was saying, go ahead and open 'Park Expansion'. You'll see that I took the liberty of setting an area aside for the pool. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_070: You have no proof they were mine! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_080: (Clears throat) Anyway, let's focus on our new area. The first thing a water park needs is... well, water. I've prepared a Blueprint for you to get started! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_090: Of course, you don't have to use that one. I only stayed up all night to make it for you, it's no big deal or anything. Just select the one you want and place it wherever you like! As long as the guests can reach it, of course. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_110: Now that we've got a pool, let's splash out on some extras! Why don't we start with some Ladders? Guests don't technically need them to enter or exit pools but they're definitely handy... at least if you're like me and enjoy flicking your hair in slow-motion as you climb out. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_120: The pool is looking great! It's just missing oneeeee thing... a Diving Board!  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_130: There are a bunch of different sizes... but you need to be careful that the pool is deep enough to dive in first before placing a Diving Board. I found that out the hard way, quite literally.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_140: Nice! That's a prettyyyy enticing pool! So, we want to make sure people can actually swim in it. To do that, we'll need to give them a place to get changed into their swimwear. Have you ever walked around in wet denim? I do NOT recommend it. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_150: Build some Changing Rooms in a place that's easy to access. Oh, and make sure it's connected to a path... for obvious reasons. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_150_alt: Build some Changing Rooms and a Body Dryer in a place that's easy to access. Oh, and make sure it's connected to a path... for obvious reasons. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_190: Phew! Found them! I can't wait to take a dip, this is all looking amazing! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_bronze_200: I'm starting to get what Oswald sees in you... You've got great potential here with us. That being said, there's still much for us to do! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_010: So, you smashed the first pool out of the park! Not literally, of course. That would be difficult, not to mention an HR nightmare. But one pool does not a water park make!  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_020: A true water park needs stuff like Wave Pools, Flumes, and Lazy Rivers. With that being said, let's start by building a Flume!  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_030: Just remember, the pool must be deep enough for guests to dive. Some can't resist a good old-fashioned cannonball... and I don't want to be the one getting fired. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_035: Now, all you need to do is add a Wave Machine. Pick whichever size you like, any wave is a good wave! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_040: Nicely done! Just make sure to hire extra Lifeguards to keep the Pool Safety in the green. I don't think I have another Eugene meltdown in me today. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_060: You'll need to know how to build a Flume from scratch, so I'll give you a crash course. First, select the Flume that you want from the many beautiful rainbow options we have available.   [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_070: Sweet choice! Now we need to start with the platform, simply place it down where you think is best. You can also attach multiple Flumes to a platform, if you're feeling adventurous. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_080: The next step is to start building the Flume itself! Start by placing the Flume entrance. This is where the slide will start, in case it wasn't obvious... [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_090: Okay, now here comes the fun part! We have the platform, we have the entrance, now we need the slide! Place it down however you'd like, just keep the angle of the slide in mind... you need the guests to get enough speed to keep going. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_100: (Chuckle) That reminds me, want to see a cool trick? Eugene can determine the angle of anything just by looking at it.  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_120: Nonsense! It's your party trick... at least it would be, if you joined me at any. C'monnnnn, what angle is... THIS? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_140: (Laughs) Bingo! How cool is that? Blows my mind every time! Err, where was I... Oh, yes! Building the slide! Alongside the angle, you should also keep an eye on the twists and turns.  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_170: Shh! Keep your voice down. I've been telling people it's from when I tried to surf wet cement... and almost managed it. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_180: Anyway, now it's time to test this baby out. We can only open the ride if the test dummy safely reaches the end. Don't worry if it doesn't work on the first try... Eugene got us a great deal on them, so we have plenty spare. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_210: Amazing job! Once you're happy with your flume, just hire a Ride Attendant to open the ride to the guests. Only one is needed per platform, even if you have multiple flumes attached. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_gold_220: The big moment is finally here! It's now time to open your very first flume ride. I'm getting oddly emotional. (Sniff) [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_intro_050: Hey mate, how’s it going? I’m Brad, and when it comes to water rides, I'm your guy. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_intro_060: I used to think everyone was admiring my physique... they'd shout 'WHAT A MAN!', but turns out they were just calling me 'water man'. I still take it as a compliment though. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_outro_040: You did such a good job here, you should be proud! I'm looking forward to riding this wave of success with you in future parks! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_outro_100: Woah, you did it! Congrats, mate, you've done such a great job bringing everything together! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_015: To do this, all you need to do is add a Water Filter to the pool. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_020: If the pump isn't working, make sure it has power. I've found most technical problems can be solved by plugging it in. It also needs to be able to reach the water of the pool to work. Don't worry though, it doesn't have to cover the whole pool, just a part will do! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_020_alt: If the Water Filter isn't working, make sure it has power. I've found most technical problems can be solved by plugging it in. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_020_alt2: If the Water Filter isn't working, make sure it connects to the plumbing. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_030: Great work! Our job isn't done yet, though. Sometimes guests can tire themselves out in the water and need a place to kick back and relax.  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_040: We should add some Sun Loungers so they have a place to chill out. Ooo, and some Ladders, and a Diving Board too! Extra little touches like these will improve the prestige of the pool! The better the prestige, the more guests will want to visit. It's a win-win! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_045: Oh, and don't forget to make sure the pool is deep enough to dive in first before placing a Diving Board. I found that out the hard way, quite literally. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_060: Yeah, great point, bro! You should try adding a few more extra touches around the pool area to get that scenery rating even higher! More is... well, more. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_070: Wicked, this is really coming together now! We should add some shops and toilets nearby too, so guests don't need to walk far to get what they need. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_080: Just like the Guest Services building, don't forget to hire Vendors to staff the new shops. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_110: Woah, that's weird. Hey, mate! Have you tried swimming? ...Hmm, I don't think that's it. Ok, yeah, they need some help.  [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_130: Breathe, Eugene. We've got this! It's all in hand. Place down a Lifeguard Point at the side of the pool. Without one, lifeguards won't be able to rescue distressed guests. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_140: All we have to do now is wait for the Lifeguard to do their job... [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_150: There we go! See, Eugene?  The guest is fine. Are... are you fine, though? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_170: While Eugene comes back down to earth, I want to say you did a great job under pressure! A lifeguard will rescue anyone they see struggling, as long as they're on duty at their Point. It's all part of maintaining our Pool Safety. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_180: Remember though, they're only Planconian, they can only cover so much area at once. Larger pools will need more Lifeguards and Lifeguard Points to keep everyone safe. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_190: Now that we have a few staff members, you should add a Staff Building to the pool zone. If Eugene wasn't enough of an example, it's important the staff take breaks and unwind.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_215: Well then, I think that's us done here! We should probably check on how the other guests are doing outside of the pool, too. Open up the Management Menu and select Guests. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_220: Woah! It seems some of our guests have a nasty Sunburn. Sunny days are the perfect companion for swimming in the cool water, but it can harm guests when they're not in the pool. Make sure you have enough Guest Services buildings to sell suncream. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_230: We can offer guests protection from Sunburn by offering Suncream from Guest Services buildings. We should always make sure guests have enough Suncream, so let's build another one and watch it fly off the shelves! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_tutorial2_silver_240: Nice one! Now the guests can protect themselves against the sun while they have fun. You've done great work in this zone, it's really come together. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_bronze_010: Coasters at this altitude get my heart pounding! I wish there was a pool to dive off into. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_bronze_030: ...I'mmmm not gonna do that, and neither should you, ever. But I'm loving the creativity. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_gold_020: A park so good people'll travel up all those steps to get here. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_gold_040: "Suzuki"? As in Kenta Suzuki? The dude trying to take down Oswald? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_gold_070: Hank... unfortunately not everyone is a true visionary like you. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_intro_060: Hey guys, how's-- Oh woah, we are way up right now! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_intro_070: I thought you said you bought land for a park, Hank? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_intro_090: The two sides? But they're not connected… [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_intro_120: Deal or not, a mountainside theme park sounds wicked. We'll make it work, let's do this! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_outro_020: I know what you mean, dude. What was two simple mountains is now a peak theme park... (Chuckles) Get it? Mountain. Peak... Mountain Peak? [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_outro_030: Man, that was hilarious. I should write that down.  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_outro_050: Oh yeah, the agent! I bet they're feeling pretty silly now, eh, Hank? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_outro_070: Yeahhhh, I don't think you're going to hear from him again, man. But hey, this was a great time! Ahhh, I'm going to miss it here. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_silver_010: The park is looking unbelievable! Massive engineering respect for your problem solving, but… [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_twinpeaks_silver_020: Hank, who did you say the agent was that sold you this place? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_bronze_010: Oh woah-ho-ho, these guests really are thrill seekers! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_bronze_030: Are you okay? I'll get you a chair... and I promise it won’t be a spinny one! [sentiment=Shocked]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_gold_030: I don't think-- (Yawns) I'm pretty sure they're janitors, Hank. [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_gold_050: Yeah...… but they're staff… to clean up... you know… (Yawn) Oh man, those rides took it out of me. I'm just… going to take a nap. [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_intro_030: Hank, did you say you won this? And it wasn't from, like, Suzuki Properties, or Suzuki Real Estate or something? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_intro_050: Riiiiight, gotcha. (Sigh) Well… This place looks pretty sweet! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_intro_060: Sunny location, amazing water views... It ticks all of my boxes! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_intro_080: Yeah, Hank... Those things might be linked. In any case, adrenaline equals thrills. So this sounds like my kinda place! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_intro_090: And if Kenta thinks we'll never live up to the peculiar and exacting standards of adrenaline junkies, he'll have to think again! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_outro_020: It's unbelievable. I think we've created a utopia! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_outro_050: Don't you normally just lurk in the background, saying ominous things? [sentiment=Confused]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_outro_080: There's no trick to it. Just amazing problem-solving and some great teamwork! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_outro_120: Oh- see ya, Kenta! Huh, he didn't even say goodbye! Guess our success really got under his skin. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_outro_140: Huh, you know what, Hank? I think a bit of kindness is exactly what he needs. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_silver_010: Woohoo! We're pushing our guests to the limit, and they're loving it! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_bradnewton_vomitworld_silver_020: Whatever you paid in "legal" fees for this place, it's already worth it, Hank. I can barely contain myself! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_buildingthebifrost_bronz: Now our guests can transport themselves between the different realms of the park. Hee hee! [sentiment=Happy]
No, not to Valhalla, Brad. The only battle they've bravely fought in, was for their place in the toilet queue! [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_eugenenewton_buildingthebifrost_gold_: Who needs to imagine, now you've got the real thing! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_buildingthebifrost_intro: All too well, Bradley. (Clears throat) Thank you for that. [sentiment=Fear]
So, getting back to the job at hand! In legends, the Bifröst rainbow bridge connected Asgard, the realm of the gods, to Midgard, the realm of mankind.  [sentiment=Neutral]
If we want to immerse people in Norse histories, we should continue work on the Bifröst bridge, that seems like a good place to start! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_buildingthebifrost_outro: Thanks for bringing us on board, Adriana. I hope they like it as much as we do. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_buildingthebifrost_silve: That's not true! I like to have fun just as much as you! The... dancing sounded fun. [sentiment=Fear]
I... erm, well I'm... partial to a little... well yes, actually, as a matter of fact, I dance all the time. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_chapter2_060: It has been our pleasure, Adriana! Please, don't be too hard on yourself, though. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_chapter2_230: Indeed... a most villainous exit if ever I saw one. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_chapter4_100: Oswald, you must stop this at once! Betty is not who she claims to be! [sentiment=Angry]
vo_eugenenewton_chapter4_130: We had our suspicions about you all along. Edith was horrified to learn you were sniffing around the plans for her park. She told me how you conned her daughter into selling her shares of their company, for your own gain. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_eugenenewton_chapter4_150: We knew you'd try and do the same thing to us, so we hid and waited until Oswald left. We heard everything. [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_eugenenewton_chapter4_230: Looks can be deceiving, Brad. Thankfully that slithery old snake has shed her skin and we can get on with the job at hand. Come on everyone, let's get back to our parks. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_gold_030: Bradley Newton… Did you just casually acknowledge risk? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_gold_050: No... no, I'm fine, I'm just-- You've really come a long way. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_intro_030: (Chuckle) What do you mean by that, Brad? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_intro_080: I'm not worried. If I've learned anything recently it's that you have a good instinct for these things. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_intro_100: If you think it'll work, it's worth a shot! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_outro_010: Hello there, uh, 'dude'. What is up?  [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_outro_030: No! No, I'm just… trying to be more cool and relaxed, like you. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_outro_050: But you're learning from me, I should be learning from you too. You can teach me how to be... hip! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_outro_080: You're right. I can barely maintain balance paddling, never mind surfing. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_silver_010: This park is truly spectacular. You did a great job on those two coasters, a marvellous display of engineering! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_silver_020: By the way... have you noticed Brad change lately? He seems much more… focused? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_silver_030: You don't think he's outgrown his big brother, do you? That he doesn't... need me anymore? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_coastercanyon_silver_050: Yes, exactly! Break's over though, let's continue! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_coastline_gold_030: Exactly, a hunch. I've told you a hundred times, Brad, research, plan, then act. [sentiment=Angry]
vo_eugenenewton_coastline_gold_070: No, no, I suppose you're right… I'm sorry. You did do a great job here, Brad. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_coastline_intro_060: Wait a minute, I know my brother. There’s a catch, isn’t there, Bradley? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_coastline_intro_090: (Sigh) Brad, you should have spoken to me first. I would have helped you avoid a mistake like this. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_coastline_outro_030: I must admit, I'm impressed. My eye has even stopped twitching! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_coastline_outro_040: Well, not stopped, but it's certainly twitching less. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_coastline_outro_050: Apologies again, I was a bit harsh on you before, Brad. I only worry because... I care. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_coastline_outro_060: Those water rides really were a hit, though. You should be proud. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_bronze_010: I must say, Kenta certainly is demanding. Doesn't he have his own theme park company? Why didn't he just use them? I don't understand why he'd bring us on board. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_bronze_030: Crumble? He clearly hasn't seen my exquisite structure designs. Let's keep showing him what Coaster Coast can do! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_gold_020: I must agree. Considering all the restrictions we've had here, this could easily have gone wrong. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_gold_030: But I keep thinking about Kenta. He really doesn't like us. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_gold_060: That's very wise, Oswald. Who said that? [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_gold_080: (Sigh) Well, Kenta doesn't seem to be here right now, so let's keep moving! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_intro_020: That's odd! Do we know who the owner is? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_intro_090: Errr, I don’t think he means- Never mind. Maybe we should just go? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_intro_110: Yes, I suppose… Looks like we've got our work cut out for us, though! [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_outro_020: Excuse me, Oswald may be many things, but he is not 'reckless'. Are you sure you've sworn revenge against the right person? [sentiment=Angry]
vo_eugenenewton_duellingparks_outro_070: Did he just… give us the whole area? Is he alright? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_epilogue_130: Just as it heals all wounds. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_gardenpark_bronze_010: So, Betty, how do you know Edith? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_gardenpark_bronze_040: Indeed, most would assume you'd be rivals. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_gardenpark_intro_080: Hmm, Edith didn't say anything about a consultation before she left... [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_gardenpark_outro_040: I think he was talking to us, Betty? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_gardenpark_outro_070: That's interesting. I've just got off the phone with Edith to tell her the good news and she's surprised you're here?  [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_eugenenewton_gardenpark_outro_080: Especially after 'last time', whatever that means... [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_gardenpark_silver_010: Oh boy, I... uh, don't know what we've done... or didn't do... but a lot of press are contacting us about this park. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_labyrinthsecrets_bronze_: I don't know, I think you might have... lost him with that one! (Chuckles) [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_labyrinthsecrets_intro_0: It is very unique. These tunnels are perfect for snaking tracks and interlinking structures. [sentiment=Neutral]
Um... Just to clarify, there will be a way out of this one, right? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_intro_020: I think I could use that right about now. It's boiling out here! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_intro_060: I'd be honoured to oversee any developments on the site. You can count on me! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_intro_090: Oh, are you sure? Then... what should I do? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_outro_050: I must admit, I quite enjoyed myself here. You were really in your element, weren't you? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_outro_070: That was also when I realised you were always going to be cooler than me!  [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_outro_090: (Chuckles) You go ahead! I think I'm going to hang out here a little while longer. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_silver_010: Wow, this place is really swimming with life, isn't it? Brad seems to be enjoying himself. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_silver_030: He shouldn't have to worry. He's brilliant. Better than I ever was at his age. He's an inspiration to me, you know? I wish... I was more like him at times. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_silver_050: That's not true! I know what he's capable of... I just worry about him, that's all. He's my little brother and he's fearless and that... terrifies me. But... (sigh) you're right, I should tell him that more. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_lazyriverland_silver_060: I'll let you get back to business. Thank you, though... for looking out for my brother, it means a lot. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_lostmonument_gold_010: Wow, can you believe these coasters actually existed? This is so much better than reading about them in a library. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_lostmonument_intro_070: They are thought to be the ancestors of our modern Planconians, and the first civilisation ever to build coasters... right, Adriana? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_lostmonument_intro_090: I'm something of an admirer, myself. I even did my PhD thesis on their history! I spent a lot of time in the library reading about the physics of coasters. They took away my membership when I started doing practical experiments in the stacks though... [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_lostmonument_outro_020: It's incredible how much coasters have changed over time. What if one day, someone is digging up our coasters and calling them old?! [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_lostmonument_outro_060: You go ahead, I....uh, want to do some more research here with Adriana first. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_lostmonument_outro_080: No, it's not like that! I-I-I-I-uh... oh...  [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_lostmonument_silver_040: I've learned so much already, the design, the materials originally used for the ride... it's a wonder they were safe. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_lostmonument_silver_050: Saying that out loud... I'm going to go and check everything over one more time. Just to be sure.  [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_newnaturereserve_bronze_: Oh my word, Brad! (Nervous laugh) Erm... he...he's just joking. Ignore him. Please. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_planningpermissionfailur: A penny farthing? But wouldn't that make you- [sentiment=Fear]
This is why you should always read the small print. [sentiment=Contempt]
(Sigh) In any case, I have worked out a deal with the estate agents to buy the remaining plots once we have secured the funds. [sentiment=Neutral]
We did it! We've managed to procure the remaining plots of land and pay off the original owner's debt! [sentiment=Happy]
I saw her getting into a helicopter shortly after you gave her the coat. She seemed to be in a hurry. [sentiment=Neutral]
Well, we don't need her to tell us that we've done a good job here.  [sentiment=Confident]
(Muttered) For good reason. (Normally) Betty... I-uh, I believe that's an eagle. They're quite common, actually. [sentiment=Confident]
It was just an eagle, Oswald. I think it's best if we continue working on the park. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_bronze_020: I believe I saw him swimming in the river. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_bronze_050: Well, you can keep getting distracted but I have plenty more tasks needing attention. Speaking of, I have a new to-do list ready to go! [sentiment=Contempt]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_gold_010: I must say, Brad, your plans have been a success. You have quite the imagination for thrilling parks! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_gold_050: You lost my plans in the WHAT? [sentiment=Angry]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_gold_060: No, Eugene, this is an opportunity to be more fun and spontaneous.  [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_gold_070: I am "totally cool" with that. Not stressed at all. I'll just… remember them all again. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_gold_090: It's okay. Let's draw up some new plans... together, as teammates! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_intro_020: (Interrupts) Oh, good! You're here. I need your help today on my magnificent idea- [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_intro_100: We're back! Ahhh, now, as you can see with my plans... [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_outro_060: Hello, you two. I think I've just had my first ever nap? I was reading The Quintessential Quarterly and the next thing I knew, the pages were stuck to my face! What are we talking about? [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_outro_080: Yes, I'm quite impressed. Two very different parks, working together in harmony. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_outro_090: It's a shame the brothers who owned it before us couldn't figure things out... but you know what, Brad, I'm glad we got to work on this together. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_silver_010: Right, all the admin for Coaster Coast is done and all I had to do was skip lunch. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_silver_020: And breakfast, and yesterday's dinner... Actually, when did I last eat? [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_splitpark_silver_040: Lost sight of--? I mean, perhaps I can get lost in the spreadsheets... but if I don't do them, who will?  [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_070: I have them sign a disclaimer on entry to the park, consenting to all telepathic analysis of their thoughts. [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_090: I couldn't agree more, our time tools will allow you to stop or even fast forward time! The Greek God Chronos has been real quiet since we developed these tools. (Chuckle proudly) [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_120: Oh, Oswald. I do wish you'd stop telling people that... although that does remind me, I must buy some more polish for that trophy. It was looking rather dull the last time I was cuddling it. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_130: I took the liberty of getting a ride ready for you to build, all you need to do is find a place to put it. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_140: I've marked out a great spot for you there, close to the entrance. Wait a second... what's all this rubbish? (Sigh) This area was meant to be cleared for your induction.  [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_150: It's fine, this is fine! It's like I always say, 'mistakes are the portals to discovery'. This will be a great opportunity for you to learn about demolishing. It's very easy, simply select the Demolish Tool and then use it on whatever you'd like to get rid of. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_160: Now the area is clear, select the ride from our state-of-the-art custom editor and place it down. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_170: Splendid! Our guests will need a way to access the ride, so let's add an Entrance Gate. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_180: And with every Entrance, we need… that's right, an Exit Gate. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_190: You will need to connect a Queue Path to the Ride Entrance. Without one, Guests will not be able to access the ride. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_200: We have a plethora of path designs for you to choose from, so go forth and pave the way with style AND orderly waiting! [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_210: We obviously won't need queues for guests leaving the ride - could you imagine? (chortle) - so you'll need to make sure you're connecting a standard park path to the Exit Gate. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_220: Right then… Gates? Good. Paths? Perfect. For the next step, you'll need to staff the ride. We'll need to hire a Ride Attendant. Drop them down... gently... near the gate and they'll take up their new post. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_230: And that's it! That's all the steps for building a ride! If you do need a handy little way to remember those steps, I used to remember it as B-E-E-P-A: building, entrance, exit, path, attendant... (Chuckles proudly) [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_230_alt: And that's it! That's all the steps for building a ride! If you do need a handy little way to remember those steps, I used to remember it as B-E-E-P: building, entrance, exit, path (chuckles proudly). [sentiment=Confident]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_240: Oh, and remember to open the ride like you did earlier on. But actually… (ponders) that would make it B-E-E-P-A-O, wouldn't it? Hmm, doesn't have the same ring to it. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_bronze_240_alt: Oh, and remember to open the ride like you did earlier on. [sentiment=Neutral]
Ooh, but remember to open the ride like you did earlier on. Actually… (ponders) that would make it B-E-E-P-O, wouldn't it? Hmm... doesn't have the same ring to it. [sentiment=Neutral]
Oh, and don't forget to open the ride! Actually… (ponders) that would make it B-E-E-P-O, wouldn't it? Hmm... doesn't have the same ring to it. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_010: Wow, the park is looking great! I can see why Oswald picked you. You're a natural! [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_020: Now, if we're to keep adding more rides or facilities, they need to be connected to the power grid. Select an existing Generator to view its info panel and see how much electricity it's producing. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_030: As you can see, the generator is powering a network that covers the area filled with rides and facilities. We're going to have to place and connect more power distributors to further expand the grid network.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_030_alt: As you can see, the generator is powering a network that covers the area filled with rides and facilities. To expand the grid network, you can place and connect additional power facilities.  [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_030_alt2: As you can see, the generator is powering a network that covers the area filled with rides and facilities. Let's expand that network to cover an open area of the park! To do that, place and connect the additional power facility to the grid. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_030_alt3: As you can see, the generator is powering a network that covers the area filled with rides and facilities. Let's expand that network to cover the highlighted area of the park! To do that, place and connect the additional power facility to the grid. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_050: Nicely done! It's all running very smoothly indeed. But to keep the generators maintained and working, you must hire Mechanics. Without them, the generators will start gaining a Condition Penalty, which will decrease the power output. [sentiment=Happy]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_060: So, with that in mind, let's look at the staff we have available and see where we could use more. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_070: Oh! It seems we don't actually have any Mechanics hired. Well, that won't do. Let's hire a few straight away! It may seem excessive, but they're essential when it comes to the maintenance of rides and facilities. [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_080: (worried whimper) Uh oh! I must have jinxed it! We've had a ride break down! Good job we have those Mechanics to go and nurse it back to health. [sentiment=Fear]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_080_alt: An available Mechanic will automatically be assigned to fix a broken ride. However, if one is not available, you will have to select the ''Call Mechanic'' button to reassign somebody to the job. Be careful though, as reassigning a Staff member might mean you no longer have coverage elsewhere! [sentiment=Neutral]
vo_eugenenewton_tutorial1_gold_090: Now that's covered, it seems we also need to hire some Janitors. Even with Bins, the paths can get messy. (Huffy sigh) Honestly, those Plancs... [sentiment=Angry]
